name: Apple Walnut Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and thinly slice 2 large apples.
2. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Lightly grease a 9x13 inch baking dish.
3. In a medium bowl, combine flour, brown sugar, and butter. Mix until the mixture is finely crumbled.
4. Stir in chopped walnuts. Press half of this mixture evenly into the prepared baking dish.
5. Add cinnamon, baking soda, and salt to the bowl. Blend well with a fork.
6. Beat together the egg, sour cream, and vanilla extract.
7. Gently stir in the apples until just combined.
8. Spread the remaining crumb mixture over the top of the apples. Press down gently.
9. Bake for 35-40 minutes (or until a tester inserted into the center comes out clean) or until the cake pulls away from the sides of the dish.
10. Allow to cool completely in the pan before serving with whipped cream.
